TextENGNew: I might have explained this before, but...
Phys Ed at our school is really just an exercise in disorder.
After some random warm-ups, the rest of the time is spent doing whatever.@k You're free to cause a ruckus or just fall asleep.

``...I'm not really sure, but doesn't the Board of Education have some sort of curriculum for this?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15040. Something like: 'When you're this old, you should have this amount of physical ability'?``
``I have no idea what you're saying, Keiichi-san; it's rather difficult to understand.``
``Well, you see.@k@vS19/02/500200075. It's something like a rule for teachers to follow during class.``
``Ahahaha!@k@vS19/03/500300100. Maybe you weakling city-folk need something like that.@k@vS19/03/500300101. But do you really think us country-raised kids would lag behind in physical ability?``
``...We're better athletes than you would think, Keiichi.``
Come to think of it... they might be right.
If we all lined up for a race, there was a good chance I'd finish dead last if I didn't start off well.
...Let's just pray that when a brutal penalty game is at stake, the 100m dash isn't a club activity.

``On that note... I watched too much television so I'm fantastically tired.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15060. I'll be using this time to catch up on my sleep.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15070. It's 4th period and I'm completely starved.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15080. ...If I don't sleep now, when will I ever?``
As I started to sprawl out on top of a pipe, Mion grabbed me by the collar.
``Tsk tsk tsk.@k@vS19/03/500300103. Do you really think I'd let you sleep in peace and quiet~?``
``...With that look on your face, it'd require more courage to try and take a nap than not.``
Good grief...@k Which means... is it going to start again...!?
``Now!!@k@vS19/03/500300105. Just killing time with idle chit-chat until the bell rings is impossible for us hot-blooded youth, isn't it?@k@vS19/03/500300106. Shall we start a club activity!?``
``Hmph, just as I thought, it's come to this.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15110. What's today's game!?``
Now that this is happening, taking a nap is impossible.
Not just that... with this sleep-deprived head of mine, I'm as good as mincemeat!
I have to get my brain into gear!!
``Rena thinks that we should decide what today's penalty game should be before we start.``
``Hehehe...@k@vS19/03/500300108. Rena knows what's up~!@k@vS19/03/500300109. I've prepared something super special today!``
She began to announce the cruel penalty game with a grand spinning flourish!@k But before she could do that—
``...I'm sorry.@k@vS19/05/500500035. I have something that I wanted to do.``
Of all people, it was Rika-chan announcing her non-participation.@k Even rare events do eventually occur.
...Losing her timing, Mion spun like a top as she tumbled to the ground.
``Whaaaaa...@k@vS19/03/500300111. ...Huh? What's the matter?@k@vS19/03/500300112. Are you not feeling well?``
``Oh, that's right.@k@vS19/02/500200078. Mii-chan, she has to practice for the Watanagashi.``
``That's right.@k@vS19/04/500400061. It's this Sunday.@k@vS19/04/500400062. Rika is in the middle of super serious training right now!!``
``I've been working too hard lately, so my arms hurt.``

``I see.@k@vS19/03/500300114. Well, there's nothing that can be done.@k@vS19/03/500300115. There's no point in doing anything if we can't get everybody together.@k@vS19/03/500300116. ...Today, let's just take it easy!``
``...I'm very sorry.@k@vS19/05/500500038. But I'll try my best.``
``Yeah! Good luck!@k@vS19/02/500200080. We'll be cheering you on~!``
When Mion announced that today's club activity was cancelled, Rika-chan and Satoko headed off behind the school building.
Only I was left alone, completely clueless as to what everybody was talking about.
``...What was that about?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15130. Is Rika-chan training for a competition or something??``
``Huh?@k@vS19/03/500300118. Didn't you get the notice at your house, Kei-chan?@k@vS19/03/500300119. Wasn't it written there?@k@vS19/03/500300120. The Watanagashi Festival is this Sunday.``
``You guys did tell me about the festival before. That's right, Rika-chan is on the festival committee, isn't she? Does it have something to do with that?``
``Rika-chan is a shrine maiden for the Watanagashi, so she has to perform a ritual dance.@k@vS19/02/500200082. It's practice for that.``
...Huh?
Come to think of it, I have a feeling Mom did say something about it during dinner the other day.@k So, Rika-chan plays the part of a shrine maiden?
``I see, Mom did say that futons, padded cloaks and stuff are made as offerings. ...So, does that mean the cotton stuffing gets pulled out during a dance or something?``
``Oh, I figured you might guess right, Kei-chan!@k@vS19/03/500300122. The Watanagashi --or Cotton Drift-- Festival is, as the name implies, where we set cotton adrift down the river.``
``They also pile futons up on the altar.@k@vS19/02/500200083. The Watanagashi is a festival that happens at the shrine on a Sunday every June.@k@vS19/02/500200084. It's very lively!``
Mion and Rena nodded back at me, looking a bit impressed.
It seemed my observations were on mark.@k Although, when I first heard about it, I imagined piling futons up in the swamp.@k ...but that'd block the river, and be a real pain to clear up after.

``I've heard of people leaving offerings of things like needles or kitchen knives to their ancestors or to casualties of war... But an offering of futons is a first for me. What's the history behind that?``

``I don't think there's a complicated backstory to it.@k@vS19/03/500300124. The winters around here are pretty harsh, so things like warm futons and coats to ward off the cold are fairly important, I guess.``

``Ah, I see.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15150. In other words, it's something like giving thanks to the futons that took care of you during the winter, then.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15160. Then, the shrine maiden holds a memorial service for them and set them adrift.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15170. That's what the Watanagashi is?``
Mion and Rena indicated that I had the correct answer with a round of applause.
``And you see, and you see.@k@vS19/02/500200089. That shrine maiden performing the memorial is... Rika-chan!``
``Oh?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15190. So Rika-chan is a shrine maiden.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15200. ...Now that you mention it, Rika-chan does have a mystical air about her.``
``Right? Right!@k@vS19/02/500200091. Rika-chan in a shrine maiden outfit... hau~!``
``Sho kyuuute!``
...It certainly does seem like it would suit her.@k Yeah, it might be kyute.
``I finally get what you're saying.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15220. Rika-chan's training is for her performance as a shrine maiden then.``

``That would be it.@k@vS19/03/500300126. The shrine maiden has to purify a number of futons as part of the ceremony.@k@vS19/03/500300127. It's practice for that.@k@vS19/03/500300128. ...It's a lot of hard work.``
``The shrine maiden has to carry a large ceremonial hoe as part of the rite... and it's really heavy for Rika-chan.``
``Well, Rika-chan is pretty small.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15240. ...Exactly how heavy is that hoe?``
``It's pretty heavy.@k@vS19/02/500200095. ...Enough that Rika-chan has been practicing with a mochi mallet.``
Wait a minute.@k That's way too heavy!!
Forget about Rika-chan, that'd be rough even for me!
``It's a sacred ceremonial hoe...@k@vS19/02/500200097. If she dropped it by accident, it'd be big trouble.``
``Well... it's a once-a-year kind of deal.@k@vS19/03/500300130. All we can do is cheer from the sidelines.@k@vS19/03/500300131. ...It'll be okay.@k@vS19/03/500300132. She pulled it off last year!``
``...Really?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15260. Then the least I can do is cheer her on!!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15270. Even something that little would help, right?``
I was rather curious about exactly how she practiced.
Mion laughed as she shook her head.
``Leave her alone.@k@vS19/03/500300134. If you go, Rika-chan will get all cute and won't be able to practice.``
Hm?@k I didn't quite understand what Mion was saying.
``You see, Rika-chan doesn't like showing people how hard she works.@k@vS19/02/500200099. Okay?@k@vS19/02/500200100. So just leave her be.``
...Even the always cool and aloof Rika-chan has times when she sweats while giving it her all.
Because she was always so well put together, she didn't want people to see an ungainly side of her... It's not like I couldn't understand that feeling.
``All I can do is pray for her success, huh.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15290. ...Do your best!!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15300. Rika Furude~!!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15310. I'm cheering for you~!!!``
Well then.
I climbed up onto the pipe, and plopped down on my side.

``Hooray! Hooray! Riiikaa-chaaaaaan.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15330. ...In order to transmit more of my psychic waves of encouragement, I'll be entering a meditative state now.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15340. ...zzzzzzz.``
``So you're just going to sleep after all!?!?``
The lackadaisical noontime ended up giving way to mind-numbing afternoon classes.
Rebounding from yesterday's hunger, I ate too much for lunch today, leaving me in a horrible condition.
``Ugh... I might have gorged myself a bit too much...@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15360. I'll... have to endure afternoon classes...``
``Ahahaha.@k@vS19/02/500200102. Keiichi-kun, you had an amazing appetite today!``
``Basically, you always eat like a pig.@k@vS19/03/500300137. But today was on a whole different level.``
``Yesterday I skipped lunch, right?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15380. That hunger just soaked right in.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15390. This time, no matter how much I ate, my hunger knew no bounds...``
``Ahahaha, I get you. I get you.``
``But really... Kei-chan, you always finish your lunch down to the last bite.@k@vS19/03/500300140. Heck, even down to the last grain of rice.``
``With food, you show your appreciation for the person who made it by eating it, you know.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15410. If you leave any behind, it's rude to the person who put in all that effort.``
Hearing that, Mion's eyes momentarily widened in surprise, followed by a cool laugh.
``Kei-chan, really.@k@vS19/03/500300142. At first glance, you seem unruly and irresponsible, but you're actually pretty conscientious.@k@vS19/03/500300143. Well-disciplined, or something like that.``
``Ah, yeah. Rena thinks so too. Thinks so too!@k@vS19/02/500200104. Keiichi-kun is a lot kinder than he looks!``
...Both of them were probably trying to compliment me, but I had a strange feeling I wasn't being complimented at all.
``That's not true!@k@vS19/03/500300145. I just wanted to say that there's a big gap between your appearance and your personality.``
``And I'm saying that's not a compliment!``
``Sonozaki-san! Maebara-kun! We're in the middle of class!@k@vS19/22/501400054. How far did you get, Sonozaki-san? Bring your notes up here.``
Startled, Mion vocalized a rather easy to understand utterance.
She was so enthralled in the conversation, she had stopped working completely.
``Ummm... Uhh....@k@vS19/03/500300147. Doing all right...☆``
``You haven't progressed at all!!@k@vS19/22/501400056. You're in the highest grade, so you have to shape up!!``
That Mion, it looks like she's getting lectured.@k Poor bastard.
``Appearances can be deceiving, in other words.@k@vS19/02/500200106a. ...Actually, appearance might be the opposite of reality.``
``...Hmmm? You say some interesting things.``
Responding to Rena's seemingly profound statement, I turned my gaze to where Satoko was happily studying together with Rika-chan.
``Are you saying that brat Satoko is actually really meek?``
If I went by what Rena literally said, then that would be the case.
I could hardly imagine Satoko being meek and gentle like a girl in some fairy tale.
``Satoko-chan's been rude lately, but just a while ago she was pretty different.``
``She acted really spoiled and always-- ...Yup.@k@vS19/02/500200109. Ehehe... keep this a secret from Satoko-chan, okay☆?``
``That Satoko... acting so cute!?``
For Satoko to play coy, I think that would have to be some part of some calculated plot.
Even if she was to hide behind someone, I wouldn't think it was because she was attached to them.
...But since it came up, I tried to imagine a gentle and coquettish Satoko.
``Hey, Satoko.``
``What is it, onii-sama☆?``
Satoko smiled cutely, and walked towards me...
By the way, for every three steps forward Satoko took, for some reason I took three steps away.
``Hm?@k@vS19/04/500400065. Onii-sama, why are you running away...?``
``Sorry, Satoko.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15480. ...For you to approach me with an affectionate smile on your face, I just have to think it's some sort of trap.``
``Th-That's so mean!@k@vS19/04/500400067. Onii-sama you meanie~!``
``Waaaaaaaa~~!!!!``
``A-Ah...!!!! So-So-Sorry!! I didn't intend to be so mean!``
The weeping Satoko came closer to me...@k ...I'm a sucker for tears...
*click*
Huh!?
A bear trap!?!?
My leg was being clamped down on by jagged metal teeth!
``Ohohoho!!@k@vS19/04/500400070. You fell for it!!@k@vS19/04/500400071. Now for the next part!!``
Satoko raised her right arm triumphantly... and traps started to trigger one after another!!
Suddenly, the wall sprang forward, throwing me three blocks away!
And there I saw... a giant metal ball covered in spikes, hurtling towards me!!!!
On top of that, in the direction the ball would knock me was a giant guillotine!!!!
``I'm not really sure, but Keiichi-kun... you're not thinking of anything completely ludicrous right now, are you?``
``Not really.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15510. Not at all...``
``That's a lie.@k@vS19/02/500200112. You've got the kind of look on your face that says: 'I'm gonna be crushed by a giant spiked metal ball~!'``
...How could my expression convey what I was thinking like that?
``Sorry.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15530. ...Imagining a meek and gentle Satoko is impossible right now.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15540. ...I'll try again when I'm in better shape...``
Next, I looked over at Rika-chan, who was working diligently on some kanji drills.
In contrast to Satoko, her default state was meek and gentle.
If Rika-chan came at me saying ``Onii-sama~☆,`` I'd hug her.@k Tightly.@k I could get used to that!!
``Keiichi-kun, you're drooling.``
``Ah, sorry, sorry.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15560. ...Then, how about Rika-chan?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15570. Are you saying that her appearance is deceiving as well?``
Saying that out loud, I felt a tinge of doubt.
...Was Rika-chan really all sweet??
Despite her appearance... she really was quite sly. Sweetly... how do you put it... evading things deftly?
``...I get the feeling that Rika-chan isn't only just sweet.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15590. ...Her appearance is definitely deceiving.``
I couldn't put exactly what I was imagining into words, but Rena managed to say what I wanted to.
She turned to me with an impish look in her eyes, like she was saying: ``Ahh, you shouldn't say something like that~``
``When Rika-chan grows up, I'm sure she'll become an incredibly devilish beauty, with men wrapped all around her little finger.@k@vS19/02/500200115. Don't you think that would be cool?``
Rena said that lightheartedly... but I, as a man, couldn't laugh at that.
The scary part about that was that it felt like it could be true.
Noticing my gaze, Rika-chan turned towards me and let loose with an angelic smile.
Both Rena and I, feeling as if that was directed towards us personally, had our hearts skip a beat.
``Hau~~... Sho kyu-kyu-kyuuuuute. Sho kyuuuuute☆``
``Rena, your nose is bleeding.``
...Appearances can be deceiving, huh.@k ...Well then, what about our Dear Leader, Mion?
I stared at her as she tried to weasel her way out of her scolding by the teacher.
By Rena's theory, that unrefined, calculating, conniving Mion also had a side of her that belied appearances.@k ...
``Then what you're saying is: 'That Mion, despite her appearance, is actually a good person'?``
``Mii-chan *is* a good person.``
``Oh, well, that *is* true!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15630. But what I'm trying to say is...``
``Yup yup~. I know what you're trying to say, Keiichi-kun.``
Catching on that I was struggling to express my feelings as words, Rena smiled even more brightly.
I'm not sure she got it at all...
``Know what?``
``Mii-chan is mysterious, right?@k@vS19/02/500200121. She's a girl, but it's like she's a guy.``
That's right.@k Mion was more than aware that she was a girl, but it was exactly as Rena said.
When Mion livened up the mood, it wasn't as though she felt like a guy or a girl specifically, but a friend of the same gender.
``If she were a guy... we'd probably be like two peas in a pod.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15660. ...Although, that's the same way it is right now. Ahaha!``
``But you see.@k@vS19/02/500200123. Even that Mii-chan... is actually really feminine.``
``...Rena.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15680. How much did Mion pay you exactly?``
``Thaat's noooot trueee~!@k@vS19/02/500200125. Geez, I'm trying to have a serious conversation, you know? You know?``
Rena started to pout. Now probably wasn't the right time to joke around.

``Mii-chan is the club president, so she's trying hard to lead everybody.@k@vS19/02/500200127. But she's really a very cute girl.@k@vS19/02/500200128. I really don't want you to forget that, Keiichi-kun...``
...Rena's gaze focused off into the distance, beyond where Mion was.
The Mion that I met at Angel Mort was unimaginably different compared to the Mion that I normally knew.
Flustered and hesitant from the unfamiliar job.@k It was a far cry from the brash and confident Mion.
Even though she had to hurry to work, she went through all the trouble to bring me food when I was on the brink of starvation.@k And she did so not as Mion, but as Shion.
What exactly was Shion to Mion?@k What kind of person was Mion exactly?
``Keiichi-kun probably couldn't even begin to imagine. Begin to imagine! ...Hehehe!``
As if to say it was our little secret, Rena held her finger up to her lips as she giggled.
``Know what?``
``Mii-chan sure has become more feminine lately.@k@vS19/02/660200170. What do you think about that, Keiichi-kun?``
``N-Nothing...``
``Nothing?@k@vS19/02/660200172. Ahahaha~♪``
Rena's large eyes peer into mine. It's as if she can see through everything.
``What?``
``Nothing~``
``Ah, don't copy me!``
Rena giggles, amused by my reaction.
Normally she feels like a dullard, but then she has these moments where she throws you a sucker punch... And when she's right, it makes it even worse.
Rena's counter punch is really something to look out for!
...Ah, whoops. This is no time to be narrating Rena's surprising sly side.
``So she's acting feminine lately, huh...``
At school, she acts manly while functioning as our leader.
But what about other places...?
The Mion that I met at Angel Mort was unimaginably different compared to the Mion that I normally knew.
She looked flustered and perplexed at doing something she's not used to. That's quite a far cry from her usual confident self, boasting about how there's nothing she can't do.
Even though she had to hurry to work, she went through all the trouble to bring me food when I was on the brink of starvation.
She still made snide remarks left and right, but she would also suddenly start blushing, or become embarrassed and make excuses.
When all is said and done, I guess Mion is still a girl that I feel I need to protect.
I'm happy that I got to see such an unexpected side to her.
Because I feel like she would only show her true self like that to someone she acknowledges as a friend.
``You're right in that she has a different feel to her, though...``
``But why? But why?``
``How should I know...?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15760. I have no clue.
``Then... do you know whose fault it is? Do you know?``
``There's someone who caused this? Who is it...?``
``I have no clue.@k@vS19/02/660200178. Hauu~~☆``
``Stop copying me, dammit!``
Rena giggled as she put her index finger to her lips in a shushing manner.
Then she gives me a profound look.
``You want to know why Mii-chan suddenly became more girly?@k@vS19/02/660200180. Well, that's something you'll have to find out for yourself.``
Rena leaves my brain filled with question marks.
Now alone, I reflected on the words Rena had thrown at me.
Why do I have to find out for myself why Mion became more feminine...? Was I wrong in thinking I finally understood her...?
Does she have yet another hidden side to her that I just don't know about yet...?
And I'm just not noticing? Or is it unnoticable because Mion is desperately hiding it...?
I seriously don't get it.
Mion—finally free from the teacher's preaching—returned to her seat, cradling her head to hide her embarrassment.
``Hmph!@k@vS19/03/500300149. This old man, you see, thinks that grade school is enough for everything you need to study for in life.``
Saying that, she plopped down into her seat violently.
Mion was actually really feminine. Right.
I wonder if I can meet Shion again.
...I wanted to talk to her again.
*CLANG CLANG*
The principal waved around the bell that served as the school chime.
The teacher rushed back to the black board and started to list everybody's homework assignments.
``Whoa.@k@vS19/02/500200131. It looks like there's gonna be a lot of homework today. Gotta buckle down!``
``Well then.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15800. ...That means, even Rena?``
``Huh? What do you mean?``
``Appearances can be deceiving.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15820. Would that apply to you too?``
``Huh? Ahahahaha...@k@vS19/02/500200134. Keiichi-kun... how do you see me? How? How?``
The Rena Ryuugu that I knew... sometimes took things too far, but was generally a kind and gentle, ideal girl.
``Really? Really...?@k@vS19/02/500200136. Then... that m-m-makes... me happy I guess...``
If she was the opposite of what she seemed, that would make her...
``...and if you were really the opposite...?``
Just try saying it, I won't be mad.@k ...That's what I felt she meant.
``Uh-huh. Rena is...?``
``E-Even if you were the opposite, you'd still be Rena. ...Right?``
This question shouldn't have been so nerve-wracking to answer.
...Maybe it was because the person in question was staring at me, but...
Even saying that took a strange amount of effort.
``Th-That's no fair, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS19/02/500200140. It bothers me when you say it that way~ ...Hau!!``
Perhaps unable to endure my silence, Rena's face started to burn red with embarrassment.
Mion walked over and started getting ready to go home.
Whenever school is over, she really does get noticeably more energetic.
It was the same relaxing walk home as always.
Digging around my pocket on a whim, I noticed something that should have been there was missing.
``What's the matter, Kei-chan?``
``...The key to my house I always carry around is gone.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15870. ...Man, where did I lose it?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15880. It's fine today since my parents are home, but still, this is bad.``
``That sure is troublesome...@k@vS19/02/500200142. Did you forget it somewhere?@k@vS19/02/500200143. Or did you drop it?``
Which one was it?
Did I take it with me this morning in the first place?@k ...Huh? Huh?
``Kei-chan, did that key have anything that would make it stand out?``
``Yeah, it's on a keychain.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15900. It was a blue fur seal, something I made for summer homework a long time ago.``
``Huh? ...Does it have its eyes shut, like it's taking a nap?``
``Oh, how did you know?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15920. Yeah, yeah, that's it!``
Mion looked away and started to whistle.

``Ummm... see.@k@vS19/03/500300157. You went for dinner at Angel Mort a couple of days ago, right?@k@vS19/03/500300158. That night, the staff found a key...@k@vS19/03/500300159. And there was a fur seal keychain attached to it.``
As she said that, she suddenly grew flustered, and added that Shion had told her about it.
``Huh!?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15940. So, I dropped it then...``
``Ahahaha, but aren't you glad they found it?@k@vS19/02/500200145. I'm sure they're looking after it for you.``
``That's right.@k@vS19/03/500300161. Why don't you go?@k@vS19/03/500300162. Shion looks the same as me, so you'll know her by sight.``
This was... a rather unexpected development.@k ...Once again, I had no choice but to go and meet with Shion...
But I also had to thank her for the bento from yesterday.
Besides, taking some time and chatting with this other side of Mion might be interesting... Half-jokingly, I began to think about things like this.

``Right.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15960. Angel Mort, was it? I'll head over to Shion's restaurant and get my key back.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI15970. While I'm at it, having a nice spot of tea might not be a bad idea.``
``Ahahahaha!@k@vS19/03/500300164. You sound like an English gentleman.@k@vS19/03/500300165. That totally doesn't suit you, Kei-chan!``
``Is this the restaurant?@k@vS19/02/500200147. The one that Mii-chan's little sister is working at?``
``Yeah. Why don't we go together, Rena?``
``Sorry to disappoint you... but I have plans with my father today.@k@vS19/02/500200149. Some other time.``
Rena seemed pretty disappointed about having to miss such a great opportunity.
``You said they're twins, but do they really look that much alike?@k@vS19/02/500200151. Enough to mistake which is which?``
``Yeah, they're totally the same.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16000. At least on the outside.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16010. ...Unlike Mion, she's well-mannered and really cute, though...``
In response to my teasing, Mion pouted and started to argue with me.
...I couldn't help but burst out laughing at Mion's little farce.
After all, they weren't just identical, they were the same person.
After going home, I changed my clothes and dug my bike out of the garage.
Just thinking that I would be able to meet Shion again gave me a mysterious feeling.
Shion, a name for a different kind of Mion.
...She was a mysterious and ridiculous person, believing she had fooled everyone like that.
I noticed that I was pedaling along quite happily.
Could it be that I was looking forward to meeting Shion?
I felt a sense of giddy anticipation, like I was headed towards a new friend's house for the first time.
What Rena said about Mion actually being really feminine sprang to mind once again.
The guilt from spying on another side of Mion, the self-consciousness from being the only one that knew about that side, these feelings mixed together.
That was Shion for you.@k Mion's little twin sister.
...Until she felt like coming out and admitting she was Mion, it was fine to just call her Shion, right?
Mion might be trying to have some fun by acting out a different persona.
As I reached the top of the steep hill, the horizon expanded before me. I was almost at the station.

``Ummm... see.@k@vS19/03/660300176. You went for dinner at Angel Mort a couple of days ago, right?@k@vS19/03/660300177. That night, the staff found a key...@k@vS19/03/660300178. And there was a fur seal keychain attached to it.``

``Ahahaha, but aren't you glad they found it?@k@vS19/02/660200182. I'm sure they're looking after it for you.``
``That's right.@k@vS19/03/660300180. Why don't you go?@k@vS19/03/660300181. Shion looks the same as me, so you'll know her by sight.``
This was... a rather unexpected development.@k ...Once again, I had no choice but to go and meet with Shion...
But I also had to thank her for the bento from yesterday.
Besides, taking some time and chatting with this other side of Mion might be interesting... Half-jokingly, I began to think about things like this.

``Right.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16050. Angel Mort, was it? I'll head over to Shion's restaurant and get my key back.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16060. While I'm at it, having a nice spot of tea might not be a bad idea.``
``Ahahahaha!@k@vS19/03/500300164. You sound like an English gentleman.@k@vS19/03/500300165. That totally doesn't suit you, Kei-chan!``
``Is this the restaurant?@k@vS19/02/500200147. The one that Mii-chan's little sister is working at?``

``Sorry to disappoint you... but I have plans with my father today.@k@vS19/02/500200149. Some other time.``

``Yeah, they're totally the same.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16090. At least on the outside.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16100. ...Unlike Mion, she's well-mannered and really cute, though...``
In response to my teasing, Mion pouted and started to argue with me.
...I couldn't help but burst out laughing at Mion's little farce. ...Of course you look the same. Because you are her.

``Don't you think it's kind of a waste to keep that just at Angel Mort?@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16120. I know it's probably embarrassing for you, but you could just show us.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16130. You know, your... erm... feminine side...``
``Ahahahaha!@k@vS19/03/660300186. Kei-chan, you kidder.@k@vS19/03/660300187. I can't show something that doesn't exist.@k@vS19/03/660300188. I'm an old man, after all.``
Mion masks how she feels with a hearty laugh and vigorously slaps me on the back.
I'm sure she thinks this is just a little skinship, but it actually hurts. I'm betting there's a beautiful autumn leaf in bloom on my back right now.
After going home, I changed my clothes and dug my bike out of the garage.
Just thinking that I would be able to meet Shion again gave me a mysterious feeling.

I felt a sense of giddy anticipation, like I was headed towards a new friend's house for the first time.

Feminine, huh...
I definitely felt those kinds of vibes, even before Rena pointed them out...
But now that I'm so overly conscious of Mion being a girl, it feels... I don't know, embarrassing? Awkward...?
I'm sure Mion feels the same way.
That's why she's been covering up the truth by pretending to be her sister, Shion.
There's Mion, a tomboy who will goof around with me while laughing loudly together. And there's Shion, a lovely girl who is clumsy and flustered when doing things she's not used to.
Both of them are my precious friend. I can't just pick one... Honestly, I wouldn't want to lose out on either of them.
...Until she felt like coming out and admitting she was Mion, it was fine to just call her Shion, right?
Mion might be trying to have some fun by acting out a different persona.
Which to me feels like it's... two birds in one stone? A gift from god?!
As I reached the top of the steep hill, the horizon expanded before me. I was almost at the station.
The last time I wasn't embarrassed since I was here with Dad, but this time I was alone... I was strangely self-conscious about it.
Meet Shion, get my key back.@k That was all this task was supposed to be...

...Hey, hey! What are you doing, Keiichi Maebara!
You're just here to get your key back, you know?
It's not like you're some love-struck schoolboy here to hand over a love letter!
Aahhh... the thoughts inside my head were slowly turning into a jumbled mess...
I came to the realization that I was downright giddy.
That's why... for just a bit...
Just a tiny little bit...
...I got a little carried away and did something really stupid.
I kicked over a parked motorcycle that was blocking the sidewalk.
It was in the way, sure, but there was absolutely no need for me to kick it.@k ...I definitely think I got too carried away.
*thunk, clack*, *CRASH!!*
As the three bikes toppled one after another like dominos, the loud noise they caused snapped me back to my senses.
``The hell you think yer doin'!!!``
...The owners of those three bikes were right there.
They looked exactly like what you'd call 'thugs up to no good.'
They lifted their heads up in an imposing manner, and yelled angrily in a way I had never heard before.

The three of them beelined towards me, the worn-down heels of their thin-soled shoes slapping noisily against the pavement. I could only stare listlessly, as if I were watching some far-off event that didn't concern me at all.
By the time I realized it, I had been grabbed by the collar and lifted onto my tip-toes.
``Dun be playin' dumb!!@k@vS19/00/badB50002. Ye knockt em ova didntcha!?@k@vS19/00/badB50003. HuuuUUUhhhh!?``
The three thugs were completely ignoring the rules of grammar, but the way they spoke was enough to make me tremble.
...Just like that, my composure drained away... my legs buckled and my throat grew dry enough to crack.
``I-I'm s-sorry... I a-accidentally--``
``Axident my ass!@k@vS19/00/badC50002. Ye kickt it didntcha dumbass!!``
I was completely at fault, so there was nothing I could say in my defense.
...As a result I was pulled even higher...
``Da hell man!!@k@vS19/00/badA50003. Da paint's all scuffed!!!``
``Yo, brat!!@k@vS19/00/badA50005. Who putchu upta dis eh!?``
``Dis iz yer gerdam fault!!``
The three of them continued to yell at me. I had no idea what each of them were saying.
Getting further enraged that I was only listening while dumbstruck, they grabbed an empty plastic crate from a nearby store and began to smash it repeatedly against a telephone pole.
Cracks formed in the crate, plastic shards flying everywhere.@k They then slammed it full-force into the shuttered storefront.
*SMASH*
The shutter let out a frighteningly loud noise.
Still not satisfied, they flipped over a case of empty cans, scattering its contents all over the place.
...Th-This was not normal...
It was something you saw often on television or in manga, but I never thought seeing it in person would be this terrifying...
I became painfully aware that the safety of civilized society was only held up by such a frail concept as morals.
My knees clattered together noisily.@k Static started to pepper my vision...
This is what you would call... absolute terror.
There was nothing I could do to stop this frightening spectacle of violence.
I could only pray for help...
...The fear I felt was just too much...
Would somebody... help me?@k My gaze floundered about the surrounding area.
I was surrounded by these three hoodlums.
No way would there be a passerby brave enough to intervene.
Maybe this was what you call... reaping what you sow.
...If I were a passerby... there would be no doubt that I'd ignore what was going on.
So this was somewhat of a cosmic retribution...
``Fookin' say sumtin!!!@k@vS19/00/badA50005. I'll fookin' stab ye!!!``
Angry yelling loud enough to rattle my eardrums spewed forth right in front of my face.
My waning consciousness was forcefully dragged back to the forefront.
The thug had cocked back his free hand and twisted his body, when suddenly, a metallic taste filtered through the back of my throat.
A chill ran down my spine like a jolt of electricity.
...Seeing what was going to happen next, I squeezed my eyes shut as tightly as possible and grit my teeth!!!
``You're making quite the racket, you stupid pieces of trash...@k@vS19/06/500600026. Get out of my sight.``
...That voice was a short distance away.
Still holding me by the collar, the three thugs spun around to look behind them.
``Dafuq ye say!!!``
Standing there was Shion.@k ...I mean, Mion.@k ...She stood there, displaying an imposing stature that I'd never seen before.
She didn't have the same look on her face as she did when we were playing around during club.
...Those were the eyes that would instill fear in anyone who looked upon them: the eyes of a raptor.
...They were the epitome of terror... At the same time, they were the most reassuring things in the world.
``I'll only say this one more time.@k@vS19/06/500600028. ...Let go of Kei-chan and get lost.``
Mion, without an ounce of fear, laid down her ultimatum.
Of course there was no way those three wouldn't go absolutely berserk.
The situation instantly turned explosively dangerous...
``Ye fookin biiiiitch!!@k@vS19/00/badB50007. I'll fookin bash yer ead in!!``
Stop it, Mion... these guys are like rabid dogs!@k No amount of bluffing will work!
``...Mi-Mion... It's dangerous... So ru—``
I knew what I was saying was pathetic.@k ...But... I couldn't let Mion get involved in this!
No matter how you looked at it, Mion was only bluffing.
...But, did Mion even know the meaning of the word ``bluff``?
However... the reason behind everything soon became apparent.
...They were slowly increasing in number. Little by little.
At first, it was only businessmen on their way home stopping to take a look.
Then, it was housewives in the middle of shopping taking a gander.
...Next, what seemed like the owner of some store showed up... and it was pretty clear he wasn't just looking.
Around Mion... there was already about seven people gathered.
It felt different than people coming out to support a friend.
...If I had to say why, it was because the group that gathered was diverse in age and gender.
The three thugs seemed to slowly realize that there was something strange about the situation.
``Who da hell are deez guys!!``
Behind them, at some point four more people of differing clothes and ages had gathered.
A girl who looked to be in middle school.
A man wearing a bakery apron.
An old lady in a house-cleaning smock.
More and more... people of various ages.
Their gazes, comparable to Mion's, were of hostility.@k Of intimidation.
Before I realized it, over ten people had formed a ring around us.
Just then,, five elementary schoolers ran in and joined the circle.
...There were some familiar faces.@k Some of our classmates.

More and more people from Hinamizawa gathered around.
...In obvious contrast, the residents of Okinomiya were passing by as quickly as possible.
``Dafuq are you guys?@k@vS19/00/badC50006. Go dafuq away!!``
The group surrounding us had suddenly swelled to around twenty people.
...Completely encircled, the faces of the thugs started to show the first signs of panic...
Nobody spoke a word, Mion included.
That made everything completely unnatural, and depending on which side you were on, completely terrifying.
...Only the thugs voices echoed out like they were screaming.
Somebody took a step forward, closing the gap between them.
...As they did, everybody else took a step forward, shrinking the circle.
The hoodlums went pale as they were pushed together, back-to-back, while still yelling angrily.
They were trying to string together vulgarities, but for some reason it sounded like they were crying out for help...
``All right, all right, all right, what's going on here? What's going on!?``

``...Oh, Officer, good timing!@k@vS19/06/500600030. There you go, the extortionists, caught red handed.@k@vS19/06/500600031. Please arrest them.``

Mion, returning to her usual self, was nonchalantly pointing out the hoodlums to the police.

No matter how much of a ruckus they caused, the officers paid no heed.
In the blink of an eye, they were crammed inside the two vehicles.
They could still be heard yelling while inside the police cars, but what they were saying was no longer intelligible.
``Are you all right?@k@vS19/11/500700002. Are you injured?``

``...No... not really.``
``Nfu-fu-fu-fu!@k@vS19/11/500700004. Well, that's a bit of a silver lining then.@k@vS19/11/500700005. Well then, have a good year.``

``...Thank you for your hard work, Detective Ooishi.@k@vS19/06/500600033. As a citizen, I thank you for your daily efforts.
It's an honor for a detective from the first division to come out all this way.``

``Please keep up the good work.@k@vS19/06/500600036. I pray for success in your future endeavors.``

The detective named Ooishi, after jovially making pleasantries, lumbered over to the waiting police car.

...So quickly, I was dumbstruck.
I didn't even get to ask the officer what was going on.
...It was like they came here quickly to disperse the mob before any trouble could start.
After making sure the police cars had left, Mion snapped her fingers sharply.
``All right! That's a wrap!!@k@vS19/06/500600038. And don't come back!``
That was the signal.@k The tension melted away in an instant as everybody began smiling.

An older lady I didn't know the name of was concerned about my injury.

``You were lucky this happened right in front of the station when it was busy, otherwise we wouldn't have been able to gather as many people.@k@vS19/00/womB50002. Next time, be more careful!@k@vS19/00/womB50003. City kids these days are pretty unruly!@k@vS19/00/womB50004. *sigh*... honestly!``
I was even warned by the old lady in the smock.

``...Like I said, I'm Shion...``
She made a troubled expression as she turned her gaze downward, blushing in embarrassment.

Now it was my turn for my face to go red.
I... didn't want to admit... that she was spot on.
``Well... I was just unlucky.@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16250. But you really saved me, Shion.``
``You don't have to thank me.@k@vS19/06/500600046. So, if you see somebody else getting bullied, help them out, okay?@k@vS19/06/500600047. ...We value that kind of thing very highly here.``
I was well-versed in that sense of camaraderie.
...But, the way I was rescued just now... something seemed a little off about that.
While I was helped out, it was honestly to an almost disturbing degree...
``...You're coming into the restaurant, right?@k@vS19/06/500600049. You must be tired, so why don't you relax for a bit?@k@vS19/06/500600050. My treat.``
...Seems that she caught the glimmer of suspicion in my eyes.
Without waiting for my answer, Shion began walking.
The last time I wasn't embarrassed since I was here with Dad, but this time I was alone... I was strangely self-conscious about it.

It's not like you're some love-struck schoolboy here to hand over a love letter!

I came to the realization that I was downright giddy.
And so in my great mood, I parked my bicycle in the stands when...
*thunk, clack*, *CRASH!!*

I witnessed a row of bikes all fall over one by one like dominoes.
And at the end of the domino chain stood Shion.
Or wait, Mion...?
Mion is being verbally bombarded by three shady-looking people who seem to be the owners of some of the bikes.

``Fookin' bash yer head in, bitch!!``
``Grrraaaah!!@k@vS19/00/huryoC66002. Gonna pay fer whatcha did!``
They looked exactly like what you'd call 'delinquents up to no good.' They lifted their heads up in an imposing manner, and yelled angrily in a way I had never heard before.

The three of them beelined towards Mion, the worn-down heels of their thin-soled shoes slapping noisily against the pavement. I could only stare listlessly at Mion as she stood there helplessly with downcast eyes, as if I were watching some far-off event that didn't concern me at all.
This is bad, I need to help her...!!
But there are three of them, and they all have a way better physique than me. We may be in the middle of town, but I don't want to think about what happens next if I stand off against them.
Or no. I'll be fine. I could get injured pretty badly, but I'll still get off with just an injury.
...But what of Mion? What if she gets blamed for this and has to face the consequences?
...At that moment, I saw a group of boys that I recognize enter the bike stall area.
``Tomita-kun! Okamura-kun!``
``Is something the matter?``
I grab them both by the shoulders and lowered my head to them with utmost resignation.
``I'm sorry, you two!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16280. This is probably a lot to ask, but I need you to do me a favor!!``
I watch the pair run off after accepting my request and look back to Mion.
Mion is on the verge of tears. There's no moment to spare...!
I ran out in a frenzy and confronted the thugs, protecting Mion.
``...Cut it out already!@vS19/01/HR_KEI16300. You're making her cry...!!``
These are the words that manage to escape my trembling throat and quivering lips.
Someone once told me. A fight is like a disease. Even if your body fails, you can win through willpower!
...Not like I actually think I stand a chance here, though.
But if I get cold feet here, Mion will end up using it as fuel to tease me with... No wait, that doesn't matter! She is my friend, so I want to help her. That's more than enough for me!
Alright, I need to stop! I need to stop thinking!
I'm just gonna go in there like I'm a fighter!
Mion quietly muttered something. It seemed to be someone's name.
But this isn't the time to be thinking such things. The three men approached me at close range, as if their sole purpose is to spit in my face.
``What da hell...?!@k@vS19/00/huryoA66004. What dafuq are ye?!!``

When I open my eyes in determination, I see the three of them were grovelling on the ground in pain, as if I had knocked them down. Woah, I'm surprisingly strong!

In the heat of the moment, I grab one of them by the collar and give them a taste of their own medicine by unleashing a barrage of whatever words I could come up with in the moment into their ear at close range. UooOOOOoohhh!!
``You don't have a clue,@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16400. idiots!!!!``
``Wh-What dafuq are ye on about?!!!``

``There's no moe in being naked!!!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16420. If you're gonna strip her, at least leave on the socks!!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16430. No matter what, even if the sun somehow rises to the west...!!@k@vS19/01/HR_KEI16440. This is an absolute, unbreakable ironclad rule of the moe industry!!!``
Indeed! I'm my father's son!!@k It is firmly incorporated in my DNA.@k I'm deeply passionate about ``Moe``!
I can't stand people who talk about ``moe`` yet only have superficial knowledge about it!
